name: sitoindoside IX
mechanism: No established human mechanism. proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: neuroprotective and immunomodulatory activity inferred from Withania constituent studies; isolated-compound mechanistic literature is limited.
contraindications: No compound-specific clinical drug interactions established.
summary: No established human mechanism. proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: neuroprotective and immunomodulatory activity inferred from Withania constituent studies; isolated-compound mechanistic literature is limited.
